title: Fleet Director of Strategy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fleet Director of Strategy''' was the title given to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] upon his limited return from retirement in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
